'''Mariqar snow q'lk''' were [[Diet/Legends|herbivores]] which resembled scaled-down [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]] with [[Color/Legends|white]] fur. They were native to the [[Jhunia Snow Plains]] on [[Neftali/Legends|Neftali]].
